title: Catch Host App — design-coverage manifest
purpose: Authoritative map of every host surface in the Flutter codebase to its Catch design file, with status + divergences. This file is the deterministic spine for repeat audits — re-runs diff against it instead of re-reading the whole app.

spine.rule: The route table IS the surface inventory. Enumerate routes from the host shell route; that set, in order, is what must be covered. Sheets, dialogs, and async states are NOT routes — they are tracked separately under `surfaces`.

legend.built: Design file exists and faithfully represents the coded screen.
legend.partial: Design file exists but omits part of the coded screen (sub-tab, embedded console, etc).
legend.missing: Surface exists in code, no design file.
legend.shared: Host route renders a screen shared with the consumer app (not host-specific code).

sources._comment: Change-detection anchors. On a re-run, compare these line counts; only re-read a source whose count moved. Counts captured at generation.

routes.notes: Per-club segmented rail _HostClubTab { edit, insights, preview } (:92, rail :942). All three now designed: EDIT (_HostClubProfileCard), INSIGHTS (_HostClubInsightsPane :1553 — range/granularity controls, metric grid, funnel sparkline, top events, reviews/saves, data quality), PREVIEW (_HostClubPreviewPane). D6 resolved.
Host's club-detail view. Renders the SHARED ClubDetailScreen — never designed in a host register. No host design file.
5-step wizard; success confirmation is a second design file.
Host's read-only event detail. Renders the SHARED EventDetailScreen. Already flagged in Host App.html footer as not-on-system.

Design = the Setup/Live/Report roster board. CODE additionally embeds EventSuccessHostSection (host_event_manage_screen.dart:276-311) — each section renders the full Event Success run-of-show console (EventSuccessHostTab.live/.report from lib/event_success/presentation/event_success_host_screen.dart:73). That console is NOT designed. See divergence D1.
Locks schedule + policy once bookings exist (modeled in design via tweak).
A distinct route that deep-links into Manage/Live for attendance-taking (host_event_attendance_panel). No standalone attendance design — design folds it into the Manage Live tab. See divergence D4.

Event Success console route. NOT the same as design screen 06 'Event created' (that is the post-CREATE confirmation, create_event_success_screen.dart). This route opens the Event Success host console — undesigned. See divergence D1.
Shared widget but host-gated: HostInboxFilter.all/unread, no matches rail (isHostApp). Design is faithful to the host variant.
Host's chat-thread view. Renders the SHARED ChatScreen. No host-specific chat design (only the inbox list is designed).

Edit/Preview segmented rail (_HostAccountTab.edit|preview, lines 90/303). Both now designed — Edit form + Preview (host profile as attendees see it). The separate full-screen HostProfileScreen route (#15) is still its own gap.
A SEPARATE full-screen profile editor ('HOST PROFILE' top bar) nested under Account — distinct from the Account tab's inline edit. Not designed. See divergence D2.

surfaces.name: Delete unused event (dialog)
surfaces.notes: Distinct from Cancel. Only deletable while no bookings/waitlist/attendance/payments/reviews. Not in the designed dialog set. See divergence D3.

surfaces.name: Create invite link (dialog)
surfaces.notes: Invite-link draft dialog (private/invite-only events). The success screen shows a code; this is the editor. Not designed. See divergence D3.

surfaces.name: Unsaved changes (dialog)
surfaces.notes: REVERSE divergence: designed but NOT in code. No PopScope/discard guard exists anywhere in lib/hosts; create/edit flows persist via draft controllers instead. See divergence D5.

surfaces.name: Empty / error states
surfaces.notes: No-clubs / no-events / no-threads + error retry. Not designed as a set.

divergences.summary: Design is a roster board; code embeds the full Event Success run-of-show console.
divergences.detail: host_event_manage_screen.dart renders EventSuccessHostSection inside each of Setup/Live/Report (lines 276-311), surfacing the Event Success host console (lib/event_success/presentation/event_success_host_screen.dart — EventSuccessHostSection:73, EventSuccessHostPanel:318) with live/report tabs. The /success route reaches the same console. The design under-represents this screen and the whole Event Success editor is undesigned.

divergences.summary: Host-analytics surface — now built as the Clubs tab's Insights sub-tab.
divergences.detail: _HostClubsScaffold (host_operations_screen.dart:857) gives each club an Edit/Insights/Preview rail (_HostClubTab :92). Insights = _HostClubInsightsPane (:1553): range presets 7D/30D/90D/Month/Custom + Day/Week/Month granularity + custom date pickers (_HostAnalyticsControls :1660), a summary metric grid with ready/partial/missing states (:1856), a trend bar-sparkline panel (:1950), top-events list (:2045), review & discovery panel (:2241), and a data-quality panel (:2297). Backed by hostAnalyticsProvider / host_analytics_repository.dart (447 lines). None of this is designed. Preview sub-tab (_HostClubPreviewPane) is also unbuilt.

divergences.summary: Account Preview now built; the separate full-screen profile editor route remains undesigned.
divergences.detail: _HostAccountTab { edit, preview } (host_operations_screen.dart:90, rail at 303) — both designed now. Remaining gap: HostProfileScreen (:556), a standalone editor at /host/settings/profile (tracked as route #15, missing).

divergences.summary: Code has Delete-unused-event and Create-invite-link dialogs the designed set omits.
divergences.detail: _confirmDeleteEvent (host_event_manage_screen.dart:1007) is distinct from Cancel; invite-link draft dialog at :767. Neither is in HostDialogs.dc.html.

divergences.summary: Code has a dedicated /attendance route + panel; design folds attendance into Manage/Live.
divergences.detail: hostAppAttendanceSheet deep-links Manage/Live (host_event_attendance_panel.dart). Acceptable consolidation, but the deep-link entry + panel aren't represented as their own surface.

divergences.summary: REVERSE: 'Unsaved changes' dialog is designed but has no code.
divergences.detail: No PopScope/onWillPop/discard guard in lib/hosts. Create/edit flows auto-save drafts instead. Either remove from the design or treat as a proposed addition.

method: 1. SPINE: grep _hostShellRoute in lib/routing/go_router.dart → ordered list of routes + builders. This is the full surface inventory; nothing host-facing is reachable that isn't here.
2. DIFF ROUTES: compare the grepped route set to `routes[]` in this file. Added route = new screen to design; removed = retire its design file. No code reading yet.

3. CHANGE-DETECT: for each existing route, compare its `source` file line count to `sources{}`. Only re-read files whose count moved — those are the only screens that could have diverged since last audit.
4. SURFACES: sheets/dialogs/states aren't routed. Refresh them by grepping showCatchAdaptiveDialog | showDialog | CatchBottomSheet | _Host*Screen across lib/hosts — cheap and bounded.
5. WRITE BACK: update statuses/divergences + line counts here, regenerate the report. The manifest is the only thing that must stay current; the HTML reads from it.
